message.content:
Edit the file `/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbw.workbench.mk` at line 49.

Change:
```
include $(RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV)
```
to:
```
include $(RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV)
```

This fixes a typo — the variable should be `RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV` (not `RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV`).

Read the file first, then make the single edit. Don't change anything else.

content.text: I'll read the file first to see the current content, then make the edit.

    17→SHELL := /bin/bash -eo pipefail
    18→
    19→# Get the master configuration
    20→include mbv.variables.sh
    21→
    22→# Submake config: What console tool will put in prefix of each line
    23→MBC_ARG__CTXT = $(MBV_CONSOLE_MAKEFILE)
    24→
    25→# Submake config: Select bottle service from a token in the rule (parsed by dispatch)
    26→RBM_MONIKER = $(MBD_PARAMETER_2)
    27→
    28→# Submake config: Where to find derived nameplate and test files
    29→RBM_NAMEPLATE_FILE = $(RBRR_NAMEPLATE_PATH)/nameplate.$(RBM_MONIKER).mk
    30→RBM_TEST_FILE      = RBM-tests/rbt.test.$(RBM_MONIKER).mk
    31→RBM_STATION_SH     = ../station-files/rbrs-station.sh
    32→
    33→RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_GITHUB_SH = BURD_TEMP_DIR="$(MBD_TEMP_DIR)"                 \
    34→                              BURD_NOW_STAMP="$(MBD_NOW_STAMP)"               \
    35→                              RBG_RBRR_FILE="rbrr_RecipeBottleRegimeRepo.sh" \
    36→                              RBG_RUNTIME="podman"                           \
    37→                              RBG_RUNTIME_ARG="--connection=rbw-vm-deploy"   \
    38→                              $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/rbg_RecipeBottleGithub.sh
    39→
    40→RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH = RBV_TEMP_DIR="$(MBD_TEMP_DIR)"                   \
    41→                          RBV_NOW_STAMP="$(MBD_NOW_STAMP)"                 \
    42→                          RBV_RBRR_FILE="rbrr_RecipeBottleRegimeRepo.sh"   \
    43→                          RBV_RBRS_FILE="$(RBM_STATION_SH)"                \
    44→                          $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/rbv_PodmanVM.sh
    45→
    46→
    47→-include $(RBM_NAMEPLATE_FILE)
    48→-include $(RBM_TEST_FILE)
    49→include $(RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV)
    50→include $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/mbc.console.mk
    51→include $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/rbrn.nameplate.mk
    52→include $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/rbp.podman.mk
    53→
    54→
    55→RBW_RECIPES_DIR  = RBM-recipes
    56→
    57→default:
    58→	$(MBC_SHOW_RED) "NO TARGET SPECIFIED.  Check" $(MBV_TABTARGET_DIR) "directory for options." && $(MBC_FAIL)
    59→
    60→
    61→#######################################
    62→#  Github Container Registry
    63→#
    64→
    65→RBG_ARG_TAG =
    66→
    67→rbw-hv.%:
    68→	$(MBC_START) "Podman VM Command Help"
    69→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH)
    70→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
    71→
    72→
    73→#######################################
    74→#  Podman automation
    75→#
    76→# These rules are designed to allow the pattern match to parameterize
    77→# the operation via $(RBM_MONIKER).
    78→
    79→rbw-a.%: zrbw_prestart_rule rbp_podman_machine_start_rule rbp_check_connection
    80→	$(MBC_PASS) "Podman started and logged into container registry."
    81→
    82→rbw-z.%: zrbw_prestop_rule rbp_podman_machine_stop_rule
    83→	$(MBC_PASS) "Podman stopped."
    84→
    85→rbw-Z.%: zrbw_prenuke_rule rbp_podman_machine_nuke_rule
    86→	$(MBC_PASS) "Nuke completed."
    87→
    88→rbw-N.%:
    89→	$(MBC_START) "New nuke..."
    90→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_nuke
    91→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
    92→
    93→rbw-e.%:
    94→	$(MBC_START) "Run experiment..."
    95→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_experiment
    96→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
    97→
    98→rbw-c.%:
    99→	$(MBC_START) "Check on latest podman VM image..."
   100→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_check
   101→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
   102→
   103→rbw-m.%:
   104→	$(MBC_START) "Mirror latest podman VM image..."
   105→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_mirror
   106→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
   107→
   108→rbw-f.%:
   109→	$(MBC_START) "Fetch chosen podman VM image..."
   110→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_fetch
   111→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
   112→
   113→rbw-i.%:
   114→	$(MBC_START) "Initialize podman VM..."
   115→	$(RBM_RECIPE_BOTTLE_VM_SH) rbv_init
   116→	$(MBC_PASS) "VM image check complete."
   117→
   118→# Lifecycle routes now delegate to bash workbench via coordinator tabtargets:
   119→# rbw-S.% -> tt/rbw-S.ConnectSentry.<moniker>.sh -> rbw_workbench.sh rbw-connect-sentry
   120→# rbw-C.% -> tt/rbw-C.ConnectCenser.<moniker>.sh -> rbw_workbench.sh rbw-connect-censer
   121→# rbw-B.% -> tt/rbw-B.ConnectBottle.<moniker>.sh -> rbw_workbench.sh rbw-connect-bottle
   122→# rbw-o.% -> tt/rbw-o.ObserveNetworks.<moniker>.sh -> rbw_workbench.sh rbw-observe
   123→# rbw-s.% -> tt/rbw-s.Start.<moniker>.sh -> rbw_workbench.sh rbw-start
   124→
   125→rbw-v.%: zrbp_validate_regimes_rule
   126→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   127→
   128→zrbw_prestart_rule:
   129→	$(MBC_START) "Starting podman and logging in to container registry..."
   130→
   131→zrbw_prestop_rule:
   132→	$(MBC_START) "Stopping podman..."
   133→
   134→zrbw_prenuke_rule:
   135→	$(MBC_START) "Nuking podman..."
   136→
   137→
   138→#######################################
   139→#  Test Targets
   140→#
   141→# Test execution migrated to bash:
   142→# - MBT_PODMAN_* macros -> rbt_exec_* functions in Tools/rbw/rbt_testbench.sh
   143→# - rbt_test_bottle_service_rule -> rbt_suite_* functions in Tools/rbw/rbt_testbench.sh
   144→#
   145→# All tests now route through:
   146→# - tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.<moniker>.sh -> rbt_testbench.sh rbt-to <moniker>
   147→
   148→RBT_TESTS_DIR = RBM-tests
   149→
   150→# Legacy test rule - now delegates to bash testbench via coordinator tabtargets
   151→rbw-to.%:
   152→	@echo "Test execution now handled by rbt_testbench.sh via tabtargets"
   153→	@echo "Use: tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.<moniker>.sh"
   154→	$(MBC_FAIL)
   155→
   156→# Batch test rule (rbw-tb.%) not yet migrated to bash.
   157→# Original pattern was: for each nameplate, restart service, run tests
   158→# To run individual nameplate tests, use:
   159→#   tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.nsproto.sh
   160→#   tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.srjcl.sh
   161→#   tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.pluml.sh
   162→
   163→rbw-tb.%:
   164→	$(MBC_START) "Batch test execution not yet migrated to bash"
   165→	@echo "Run individual test suites via tabtargets instead:"
   166→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.nsproto.sh"
   167→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.srjcl.sh"
   168→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.pluml.sh"
   169→	$(MBC_FAIL)
   170→
   171→zRBC_TEST_RECIPE = test_busybox.recipe
   172→
   173→zRBC_FQIN_FILE     = $(MBD_TEMP_DIR)/fqin.txt
   174→zRBC_FQIN_CONTENTS = $$(cat $(zRBC_FQIN_FILE))
   175→
   176→rbw-tg.%:
   177→	$(MBC_START) "Test github action build, retrieval, use"
   178→	$(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/test/trbim_suite.sh $(MBD_TEMP_DIR)
   179→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   180→
   181→rbw-tf.%:
   182→	$(MBC_START) "Fast test - now using bash testbench"
   183→	tt/rbg-l.ListCurrentRegistryImages.sh
   184→	tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.pluml.sh
   185→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   186→
   187→rbw-ta.%:
   188→	$(MBC_START) "RUN REPOWIDE TESTS"
   189→	$(MBC_STEP) "Github tests..."
   190→	tt/rbw-tg.TestGithubWorkflow.sh
   191→	$(MBC_STEP) "Bottle service tests (manual - run each tabtarget)..."
   192→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.nsproto.sh"
   193→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.srjcl.sh"
   194→	@echo "  tt/rbw-to.TestBottleService.pluml.sh"
   195→	@echo "Note: parallel batch test execution not yet migrated to bash"
   196→	$(MBC_FAIL)
   197→
   198→
   199→#######################################
   200→#  TabTarget Maintenance TabTargets
   201→#
   202→#  Helps you create default form tabtargets in right place.
   203→
   204→# Parameter from the tabtarget: what is the full name of the new tabtarget, no directory
   205→RBC_TABTARGET_NAME   =
   206→
   207→zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE  = $(MBV_TABTARGET_DIR)/$(RBC_TABTARGET_NAME)
   208→zRBC_DISPATCH_SCRIPT = $(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/mbd.dispatch.sh
   209→zRBC_TABTARGET_CMD   = 'cd "$$(dirname "$$0")/.." &&  $(zRBC_DISPATCH_SCRIPT) jp_single om_line "$$(basename "$$0")"'
   210→
   211→ttc.CreateTabtarget.sh:
   212→	@test -n "$(RBC_TABTARGET_NAME)" || { echo "Error: missing name param"; exit 1; }
   213→	@echo '#!/bin/sh'           >  $(zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE)
   214→	@echo $(zRBC_TABTARGET_CMD) >> $(zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE)
   215→	@chmod +x                      $(zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE)
   216→	git add                        $(zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE)
   217→	git update-index --chmod=+x    $(zRBC_TABTARGET_FILE)
   218→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   219→
   220→ttx.FixTabtargetExecutability.sh:
   221→	$(MBC_START) "Repair windows proclivity to goof up executable privileges"
   222→	git update-index --chmod=+x $(MBV_TABTARGET_DIR)/*
   223→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   224→
   225→
   226→#######################################
   227→#  Bash File TabTargets
   228→#
   229→
   230→lmci-b.%:
   231→	$(MBC_START) "Bundle: Placing file batch on clipboard..."
   232→	$(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/lmci/bundle.sh $(MBD_CLI_ARGS) | putclip
   233→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   234→
   235→lmci-s.%:
   236→	$(MBC_START) "Strip: Cut trailing whitespace and assure terminal newline..."
   237→	$(MBV_TOOLS_DIR)/lmci/strip.sh $(MBD_CLI_ARGS)
   238→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   239→
   240→
   241→
   242→#########################################
   243→#  Legacy helpers
   244→#
   245→
   246→rbw-hw.%:
   247→	$(MBC_START) "Helper for WSL Distribution Management:"
   248→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) Stop wsl:
   249→	@echo
   250→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     wsl --shutdown"
   251→	@echo
   252→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "List current distributions:"
   253→	@echo
   254→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     wsl -l -v"
   255→	@echo
   256→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "List available distributions:"
   257→	@echo
   258→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     wsl --list --online"
   259→	@echo
   260→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "Delete a distribution:"
   261→	@echo
   262→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     wsl --unregister <DistroName>"
   263→	@echo
   264→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "Install a distribution:"
   265→	@echo
   266→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     wsl --install <DistroName>"
   267→	@echo
   268→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "Install Required Podman Dependencies:"
   269→	@echo
   270→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install make"
   271→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install ncurses   # for tput"
   272→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install qemu-img"
   273→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install qemu-system-x86"
   274→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install libvirt-daemon-driver-qemu"
   275→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     sudo dnf install virtiofsd"
   276→	@echo
   277→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "Access Windows C: drive:"
   278→	@echo
   279→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     cd /mnt/c"
   280→	@echo
   281→	$(MBC_SHOW_NORMAL) "Validate Podman Installation:"
   282→	@echo
   283→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     podman --version"
   284→	$(MBC_RAW_YELLOW)  "     podman machine ls"
   285→	@echo
   286→	$(MBC_PASS) "No errors."
   287→
   288→
   289→zRBW_PODMAN_INSTALL_ROOT = /cygdrive/c/podman-remote
   290→zRBW_PODMAN_INSTALL_WIN  = $(shell cygpath -wa $(zRBW_PODMAN_INSTALL_ROOT))
   291→
   292→zRBW_SAMPLE_HTML_ROOT = /cygdrive/c/podman-remote/podman-5.4.0/docs
   293→
   294→zRBW_DOC_CONSOLIDATOR_PYTHON = Study/study-strip-podman-docs/spd.strip-podman-docs.py
   295→
   296→zRBW_DOC_CONSOLIDATION_IMAGE = ghcr.io/bhyslop/recipemuster:bottle_deftextpro.20250227__172342
   297→
   298→rbw-D.DigestPodmanHtml.sh:
   299→	echo path is -> $(zRBW_PODMAN_INSTALL_WIN)
   300→	podman -c podman-machine-default run --rm \
   301→	  -v '$(zRBW_PODMAN_INSTALL_WIN)':/podman-remote:ro \
   302→	  -v ./Study/study-strip-podman-docs:/app/study:rw \
   303→	  $(zRBW_DOC_CONSOLIDATION_IMAGE) \
   304→	  python /app/study/spd.strip-podman-docs.py /podman-remote /app/study/output
   305→
   306→oga.OpenGithubAction.sh:
   307→	$(MBC_STEP) "Assure podman services available..."
   308→	cygstart https://github.com/bhyslop/recipemuster/actions/
   309→
   310→
   311→# EOF
   312→

content.text: Now I'll make the edit on line 49, changing `RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV` to `RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV`:

content.content: The file /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbw/rbw.workbench.mk has been updated successfully.

content.text: Done. I've successfully changed line 49 from `include $(RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV)` to `include $(RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV)`. The typo has been fixed—the variable now correctly references `RBRR_GITHUB_PAT_ENV` (Recipe Bottle Regime Repo) instead of `RBV_GITHUB_PAT_ENV` (Podman VM).
